## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm release:check` (if packaging or release flow changed)

## Release notes

- [ ] Added a changeset for user-facing or release-relevant changes
- [ ] Updated docs if CLI usage or publish behavior changed
